extension.description: [COLOR limegreen]Open[/COLOR]Wizard offers many maintenance features, selective add-on data saving, and automated build installs.
[COLOR limegreen]Open[/COLOR]Wizard cung cấp nhiều tính năng bảo trì, lưu trữ dữ liệu add-on một cách chọn lọc và cài đặt tự động các bản custom.
extension.news: 2.0.7.1 - Việt hóa giao diện người dùng, sửa vài lỗi thông báo. 2.0.7 - Fix Error when using default log settings 2.0.6 - Fix regex for formatting tags - Fix theme selection after build install - Fix downloading into invalid path 2.0.5 - Add Enable All Add-ons after Build Install 2.0.4 - Fix leftover broken dialogs 2.0.3 - Don't show previous version builds in Matrix 2.0.2 - Replace remaining occurences of LOGNOTICE 2.0.1 - Add attribution to @slamious 2.0.0 - Initial Matrix support 1.4.5 - Fix bugs with unintended files being cleared` 1.4.4 - Transfer ownership 1.4.3 - Fix missing artwork on items (thanks @xulek) 1.4.2 - A few bug fixes 1.4.1 - Fix crash on fresh installs 1.4.0 - Fix APK Installer - Convert official APK downloader to use official script - Add scrollbar to Save Data dialog - Fix skin path in build info 1.3.7 - Fix import lock error 1.3.6 - Fix notifications - Cleanup log files 1.3.5 - Add Fen - Add Shadow - Fix restoring saved data every boot 1.3.4 - Fix bad indent 1.3.3 - Fix Unicode characters in notification window 1.3.2 - Fix build restore 1.3.1 - Fix "Keep Login Info" menu 1.3.0 - Fix formatting of saved restore times - Fix local build zip being deleted on restore - Add YouTube API saving - Remove broken context menus - Fix repeating dialogs from shortcuts/favorites - Remove "Normal Install" option - Add "Logging Tools" menu - Add option to save guisettings.xml - Add TMDbHelper Fanart.tv saving - More fixes for OS X - Fix Seren Fanart.tv saving 1.2.9 - Fix NuMb3r5 cache clearing - Fix hang during repo force check - Fix logins being restored every startup - Fix some file permission errors - Fix OS X backup errors 1.2.8 - Add Gaia PM OAuth - Fix binary add-on restoration - Fix some issues with old settings - Fix timing on many startup tasks 1.2.7 - Add TheMovieDb Helper 1.2.6 - Fix Seren PM OAuth 1.2.5 - Fix typo in debridit.py 1.2.4 - Cover more edge cases during binary detection 1.2.3 - Fix notification ID bug 1.2.2 - Add Seren PM OAuth - Add AllDebrid spport for Gaia, Seren, ResolveURL, and URLResolver 1.2.1 - General bug fixes 1.2.0 - Silence save data notifications on startup - Fix Addon Installer menu - Convert addons.txt to JSON format 1.1.1 - Fix error on advancedsettings categories 1.1.0 - Add back advancedsettings area under System Tweaks/Fixes - Rudimentary version of advancedsettings editor. Can currently only handle editing pre-existing tags under 'cache' and 'network'. - Convert advanced.txt to JSON format - Add "built-in" advancedsettings.xml presets 1.0.3 - Update artwork - Fix rare issues with URLs not working - Fix repetitive build prompt (again) - Fix builds downloading twice - Fix title coloring on notifications - Fix auto repo install - Fix first run settings not being respected 1.0.2 - Fix crash in login menu - Fix auto install repo 1.0.1 - Fix double startup - Fix repetitive build prompt - Fix main menu not opening on Krypton - Fix notification timeout - Fix crash in Trakt menu 1.0.0 - Initial Commit

extension.description: This repo contains addons related to the Jellyfin project

extension.news: 1.1.69[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR]- Code cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.68[CR]- Improved skin shortcuts implementation[CR]- Improved widget info for episodes[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Code cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.67[CR]- Improved skin performance[CR]- Added option for always visible controls in extended now playing info[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.66[CR]- Improved extended now playing info[CR]- Minor adjustments to furniture icons[CR][CR]1.1.65[CR]- Improved overall experience[CR]- Improved star rating[CR]- Added support for animated artwork module (!thx PvD)[CR]- Improved textbox autoscroll function (!thx manfeed)[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.64[CR]- Improved extended now playing info[CR]- Improved auto playing trailers[CR]- Added just watch icon[CR]- Fixed issue with jumpbar[CR]- Improved overall experience[CR]- Improved textures, cleanup[CR]- Improved code, cleanup[CR]- Added lower percentage values for netflix window[CR][CR]1.1.63[CR]- Improved animations[CR]- Improved extended now playing[CR]- Improved OSD code[CR]- Improved overall experience[CR]- Fixed issues[CR][CR]1.1.62[CR]- Fixed issues with clearlogo and pvr osd[CR]- Added option for is playing indicator[CR]- Added option to use embuary helper for blur[CR]- Improved view 520[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR][CR]1.1.61[CR]- Improved container types[CR]- Improved widget information for episodes[CR]- Added indicators to featured home menu layout[CR]- Added additional music flags[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.60[CR]- Improved overall experience[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Added EDL markers[CR]- Improved code, cleanup[CR]- Added option to ignore embedded fanart by addons (!thx Nanomani)[CR][CR]1.1.59[CR]- Added auto playing trailers[CR]- Improved home menu widgets movement[CR]- Added jumpbar to views 510, 521, 522, 523, 527[CR]- Fixed issues[CR][CR]1.1.58[CR]- Added glow/zoom option for focused items[CR]- Added new view 527[CR]- Improvements to home header (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Fixed issues[CR][CR]1.1.57[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Minor improvements (!thx Nanomani)[CR][CR]1.1.56[CR]- Improvements to music osd[CR]- Improved overall usability/user experience[CR]- Updated translations[CR]- Improvements to colorpicker window, video osd and animations[CR]- Addon icon updated[CR]- Added option to flix views to disable netflix fanart window[CR]- Litebox script is now used for effects like blur, twotone or pixelate[CR]- Improved addon description and summary[CR]- Issues fixed, code cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.55[CR]- Addon infos changed[CR]- First start options set[CR][CR]1.1.54[CR]- Improvements to nowplaying info[CR]- First start options set[CR]- Music visualisation improved[CR]- Rearranged power menu items[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR]- Texture update[CR][CR]1.1.53[CR]- French language update (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Core/LibreElec settings rework (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Improved animations[CR]- Background issues fixed[CR]- Improved nowplaying/musicvisualisation/musicosd[CR]- Improved skin settings[CR]- German language update[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.52[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Improved performance[CR]- Language strings corrections[CR]- Improved DialogInfo animations[CR]- Added option to enable lock of skin theme/color/font[CR]- Texture update[CR]- Code cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.51[CR]- Rework on skin settings (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Added support for colorbox script[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- Added coreelec/libreelec icons (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Fixed clearlogo position (!thx Fabricio Augusto)[CR]- Added wip option to lock skin theme/color[CR]- Added m4a icons[CR][CR]1.1.50[CR]- Fixed issues with language strings (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Fixed issue with background[CR]- Added option to hide scrollbar for more views (!thx Fabricio Augusto)[CR]- Added option for underline items in vertical multi widgets home menu (!thx Nanomani)[CR][CR]1.1.49[CR]- Texture update[CR]- Improved netflix preview window[CR][CR]1.1.48[CR]- Fixed issue with background[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR]- Code optimization[CR][CR]1.1.47[CR]-Improved widget animations for netflix and clean/minimal layouts[CR]- Fixed an issue with weather background[CR]- Added playdisc shortcut to home menu[CR]- Added audiostreams info to furniture icons[CR]- Code optimization[CR][CR]1.1.46[CR]- Added new home menu layout[CR]- Fixed issue with background[CR]- Fixed issue with language strings (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- French language update (!thx Nanomani)[CR][CR]1.1.45[CR]- Fixed issue with background (!thx Skyla)[CR][CR]1.1.44[CR]- Added brightness setting for background/blur[CR]- Improved some skin settings[CR]- Added fading time setting for background[CR]- Added option to use thumbnail instead fanart in upnext addon[CR]- Added new viewtypes for widgets[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Added view 526 for seasons[CR]- German, italian language update (!thx semool, nanomani)[CR][CR]1.1.43[CR]- Added new viewtype aspect for home menu widgets[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues, e.g. musicvideos flags, strings, ...[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR][CR]1.1.42[CR]- Added new default mpaa flags[CR]- Improvements to DialogAddonInfo[CR]- Italian language updated (!thx Zurg)[CR]- Added option to enable IMDB position[CR]- Added view 524 for seasons[CR]- Improved views content type (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Fixed minor issue with background[CR]- Added option to hide background of PVR channel icon[CR]- Improved colorpicker dialog[CR]- French language update (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Added support for artwork downloader in DialogVideoInfo[CR][CR]1.1.41[CR]- Consistency update[CR]- Performance improvements[CR]- Added netflix clearlogo to netflix homemenu viewtypes[CR]- Italian language update (!thx Zurg)[CR]- German language update (!thx semool)[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Improvements to some views[CR]- Code cleanup[CR]- French language update (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Added option to set fallback image for music visualisation (!thx for request: hordesprime)[CR]- Improvements to DialogPlayerProcessInfo[CR]- Improvements to Video OSD[CR]- Fixed issues with PVR OSD icons[CR][CR]1.1.40[CR]- Added pvr vertical widgets[CR]- Added tagline option for DialogVideoInfo, improvements (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Added radio channel widgets[CR]- Cleanup the code[CR]- Added option to enable smaller icons in view 510[CR]- Changed list type option to select list type for each widget[CR]- Updated french language[CR]- Updated italian language strings (!thx Zurg)[CR][CR]1.1.39[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR][CR]1.1.38[CR]- Improved Skinshortcuts menu[CR]- French language updated[CR]- German language updated (!thx semool)[CR]- Fixed issues in PVR section[CR]- Cleanup the code[CR][CR]1.1.37[CR]- Added widgets content[CR]- Issues fixed[CR]- French language updated[CR]- Autoscroll widgets improvements[CR][CR]1.1.36[CR]- Fixed issue with more-item[CR][CR]1.1.35[CR]- Skin settings and viewtype options improvements[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR]- Fixed navigation issues[CR]- New screenshots added[CR]- French language updated[CR][CR]1.1.34[CR]- French language updated (!thx Nanomani)[CR]- Added support for script.arctic.zephyr.mod.autocolors (!thx semool)[CR]- Added music view 523[CR]- Texture improvements[CR][CR]1.1.33[CR]- Bugfix release[CR][CR]1.1.32[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR]- Added new watched flag indicators[CR]- Language strings updates (!thx semool, Dis90)[CR]- Added by director info to dialogvideoinfo[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR][CR]1.1.31[CR]- Improvements of music OSD[CR]- Added option to disable homemenu items in skinshortcuts[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Added new views 521/522[CR]- Hungarian language updated (!thx frodo19)[CR][CR]1.1.30[CR]- Removed unneeded textures[CR]- Code cleanup[CR]- Improved custom blur settings[CR]- Added option for autoscroll widget titles[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Minor adjustments[CR][CR]1.1.29[CR]- Improved widget diffuse textures[CR]- Removed unneeded textures[CR]- Added option to disable startup window[CR]- Fixed issues[CR]- Added tvshow provider icons to extended infos[CR]- Code cleanup[CR][CR]1.1.28[CR]- Fixed issues with multi backgrounds and background playlists[CR][CR]1.1.27[CR]- Background code improvements[CR]- Added trakt - add to watchlist button[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- fixed issues (!thx)[CR]- minor adjustements[CR][CR]1.1.26[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Added now playing setting[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- Views adjusted for better consistency[CR][CR]1.1.25[CR]- Fixed weather issue[CR][CR]1.1.24[CR]- Added indicator setting[CR]- Fixed playback issue (!thx)[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR]- Added tmdbhelper fallback labels[CR]- Added setting to diable next aired info[CR][CR]1.1.23[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Added option for widgets fade animation [CR]- Added discart for osd [CR]- Added new HDR, DolbyVision and web-dl flags[CR]- Added option to set spotlight widget path[CR]- Added autoscroll for classic widgets[CR]- Enabled extended infos for episodes[CR][CR]1.1.22[CR]- Improvements on plot overlays[CR]- Code and texture improvements, cleanup[CR]- Language strings updated by several contributors, thx![CR][CR]1.1.21[CR]- Code improvements, cleanup[CR]- ColorPicker dialog improvements[CR]- DialogSelect using poster instead icon, if available[CR]- Scrollbar improvements[CR]- Texture improvements[CR]- Option to select media flags added[CR]- Added homemenu viewtype selector[CR]- Minor adjustments of now playing[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Ultra HD Blu Ray icon added[CR]- Language strings updated by several contributors, thx![CR]- Addon is renamed to Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded[CR]- Added option to hide all indicators[CR]- Added widget 6[CR]- Added custom powermenu[CR][CR]1.1.20[CR]- Added netflix homemenu layout[CR]- Added custom widgets[CR][CR]1.1.19[CR]- Fixed issues, code cleanup[CR]- Improvements on animations[CR]- Added custom coreelec settings[CR][CR]1.1.18[CR]- Code improvements[CR]- Fixed issues[CR][CR]1.1.17[CR]- Improvements on dialoginfo overlay[CR]- Fixed issue with sets info[CR]- Added support for script.skin.info.service[CR][CR]1.1.16[CR]- Widgets cleanup, improvements on supported addons section[CR][CR]1.1.15[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues, cleaned up the code[CR]- Cinema experience support of embuary.helper addon added[CR]- Widgets added[CR]- Now playing info added[CR]- Dialog settings added[CR]- Fixed rating flags[CR]- Improvements on osd/homemenu/views[CR][CR]1.1.14[CR]- Fixed issues[CR][CR]1.1.13[CR]- Texture improvements[CR]- Fixed a lot of issues[CR]- Rework on filemanager[CR]- Added tempo function[CR]- Added new kodi 19 infolabels[CR]- Added german telecast offers support[CR]- Code improvements[CR][CR]1.1.12[CR]- Cleanup the code[CR]- Only icons version added to vertical multi widget homemenu[CR]- Added header label for hubs[CR]- Improvements on color-settings, blur settings[CR]- Switched to tmdbhelper for next aired info[CR]- More changes for matrix compatibility[CR][CR]1.1.1[CR]- First matrix version
extension.summary: Klar, minimalistisch, elegant, einfach, leicht. Basiert auf dem original Arctic: Zephyr Skin von jurialmunkey.
Clean, minimal, elegant, simple, light. Based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin by jurialmunkey.
Clean, minimal, elegant, simple, light. Based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin by jurialmunkey.
Clean, minimal, elegant, simple, light. Based on the original Arctic: Zephyr skin by jurialmunkey.
Limpio, minimalista, elegante, simple, ligero. Basado en el original Arctic: Zephyr skin por jurialmunkey.
Clair, minimaliste, élégant, simple et léger. Basé sur le skin original Arctic: Zephyr par jurialmunkey.
Net, minimal, élégant, simple, léger. Basé sur le skin original Arctic: Zephyr par jurialmunkey.
Švari, minimali, elegantiška, paprasta, lengva. Basato sull'originale Arctic: Zephyr skin di jurialmunkey.
Schoon, minimaal, elegant, simpel, licht. Gebaseerd op de originele Arctic: Zephyr skin door jurialmunkey.
Prosta, minimalista, elegancka i lekka. Na podstawie oryginalnego skinu Arctic: Zephyr autorstwa jurialmunkey.
Curat, minimalist, elegant, simplu, ușor. Bazat pe pielea originală Arctic: Zephyr de jurialmunkey.
Опрятный, минималистичный, элегантный, простой, светлый. Основано на оригинальном скине Arctic: Zephyr от jurialmunkey.
extension.description: Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded basiert auf dem original Arctic: Zephyr Skin von jurialmunkey und ist ein minimalistisches, klares und simples Interface für deine Medien mit dem gewissen Etwas.
Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded is based on original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.
Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded is based on original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.
Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded is based on original Arctic: Zephyr skin, created by jurialmunkey. Arctic focuses on being simple, clean and minimalistic with a light spin.
Arctic: Zephyr - Reloaded est basé sur le skin original Arctic: Zephyr, créé par jurialmunkey. Arctic se focalise sur le fait d'être simple, claire et minimaliste.
